Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce a POWL model description not code execution

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Sequence OR to MS to QS to AS to loop of IQC and AS to loop of TST and RT to PK to optional LB to DP to D

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Observations IQC loop after AS there is an in line quality check IQC If fails rework AS then IQC again

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Represent as loop between AS and IQC where execute AS then either exit or execute IQC and then AS again

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The pattern is after AS do IQC if fails go back to AS then IQC again so loop AS IQC works

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Testing loop TST and RT After TST if fails RT leads back to TST

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: To model TST then possibly RT then TST again we set loop with TST and RT

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Optional LB choice between LB and silent transition skip

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Overall partial order sequence with all steps sequential except the optional labeling choice

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We could model that after PK LB can be concurrent with DP

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: But labeling is after packaging before distribution planning so we can still model as sequential

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus root StrictPartialOrder nodes OR MS QS loop1 loop2 PK xorLB DP D with edges OR to MS MS to QS QS to loop1 loop1 to loop2 loop2 to PK PK to xorLB xorLB to DP DP to D
